recommendations.title: Intruder
recommendations.overview: The overnight stock crew of a local supermarket find themselves being stalked and slashed by a mysterious maniac.

recommendations.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money
recommendations.overview: A bank-robbing gang of misfits heads to Mexico with the blueprints for the perfect million-dollar heist, but when one of the crooks wanders into the wrong bar, the thieving cohorts develop a thirst for blood.

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part II
recommendations.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
recommendations.overview: Doctor Strange, with the help of mystical allies both old and new, traverses the mind-bending and dangerous alternate realities of the Multiverse to confront a mysterious new adversary.

recommendations.title: Casino
recommendations.overview: In Las Vegas, two best friends--a casino executive and a Mafia enforcer--compete for a gambling empire and a fast-living, fast-loving socialite.

recommendations.title: The Quick and the Dead
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman comes to compete in a quick-draw elimination tournament, in a town taken over by a notorious gunman.

recommendations.title: Dark Country
recommendations.overview: Two honeymooners rescue a mysterious car crash survivor in the Las Vegas desert. But their decision to save the man becomes increasingly regrettable when he turns on them, forcing the newlyweds to do the unthinkable.

recommendations.title: The Hangover Part II
recommendations.overview: The Hangover crew heads to Thailand for Stu's wedding. After the disaster of a bachelor party in Las Vegas last year, Stu is playing it safe with a mellow pre-wedding brunch. However, nothing goes as planned and Bangkok is the perfect setting for ano

recommendations.title: DeVour
recommendations.overview: Friends become increasingly addicted to a video game that has an evil agenda.

recommendations.title: London
recommendations.overview: London is a drug laden adventure that centers on a party in a New York loft where a young man is trying to win back his ex-girlfriend.
